prestazioni: Engine: Radical RPE V8 (code: RPE-SR8-3.2L) – forged internals upgrade with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, JE Pistons 12.5:1 compression forged pistons, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Peterson Fluid Systems (4-stage, 10L capacity) to handle sustained 10,000+ RPM track sessions.

Forced Induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos (externally wastegated, 1.35 bar boost) with custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifolds by Burns Stainless, feeding into a 3.5" titanium exhaust system with Akrapovič carbon-fiber mufflers. Intercooling via a PWR 4-core front-mount intercooler with dual 120mm Spal fans and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump for consistent intake temps.

Drivetrain & Handling: Quaife ATB differential with 4.10:1 final drive ratio, paired with a Hewland LD200 sequential gearbox (dog-ring, straight-cut gears). Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers (250lb/in front, 300lb/in rear springs) and spherical bearing polybushings from SuperPro. Braking via Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers (380mm front, 355mm rear) with carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X) and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber aero package by Radical Performance Engineering (RPE), including a revised front splitter with integrated dive planes, a rear diffuser with Gurney flap, and a fixed rear wing (NACA 63A012 airfoil) with adjustable angle of attack (0-12 degrees). Underbody features a full-length flat floor with vortex generators for ground-effect downforce.

Bodywork: Custom carbon-fiber body panels (pre-preg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave) with a matte clear coat finish, including a removable roof panel (Dyneema honeycomb core) and a quick-release rear clamshell for engine access. Side skirts feature integrated LED running lights (Osram Oslon Black Flat) and NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Interior: Full FIA-spec roll cage by Safety Devices (8-point, T45 steel) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360, 3.6kg Novec 1230). Seats are Sparco Pro 2000 (carbon-Kevlar, HANS-compatible) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Steering wheel is a Momo Prototipo (quick-release, Alcantara grip) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash (12 data channels, lap timing, and predictive lap delta).
